tonight.daytimeHint: Daylight is still up. First realistic viewing window starts around {{time}}.
tonight.bestWindowSummary: {{cloud}}% cloud cover at the strongest moment, at {{spot}}.
tonight.pullToRefresh: Pull to refresh when forecast data becomes available.
tonight.noRecommendation: No spot recommendation yet. Try refreshing once the forecast feed stabilizes.
tonight.topSpotsSubtitle: Short preview here. Use the Spots tab for sorting and the full ranked list.
tonight.closerAlternativesSubtitle: Nearest options for a faster departure.
tonight.hourlyScoreA11y: Hourly aurora score tonight, with the best window highlighted

allSpots.title: All spots
allSpots.subtitle: Compare spots without burying the important bits. Switch between strongest and quickest options.
allSpots.emptyText: Pull to refresh once forecast data is available for tonight.
allSpots.attribution: Some spot details verified with Tromsø kommune

auroraMap.title: Aurora frames
auroraMap.subtitle: Switch between now, +1h, and +4h.
auroraMap.frameUnavailableText: The UiT image feed did not load. Open the source page directly to verify whether the feed is down or the frame path changed.
auroraMap.legendText: NO-SPACE weather lab at UiT. Frame mode: {{mode}}.

liveCameras.title: Sky check
liveCameras.subtitle: Quick horizon check before you head out. Auto-refreshes every minute.
liveCameras.headerMeta: Grouped by location so multi-camera areas read like one overview instead of a long feed.
liveCameras.emptyText: Camera sources are temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
liveCameras.unavailableText: {{name}} did not return an image. Open the source page to check whether the feed is offline.

mapScreen.title: Scout spots in driving order
mapScreen.selectionNoteNative: Selected stop defaults to the nearest listed spot for quicker orientation. Use the close button to clear it.
mapScreen.selectionNoteWeb: Selected stop defaults to the nearest listed spot so you get a useful starting point immediately.
mapScreen.emptyTitle: Tap a marker to inspect a viewing stop.
mapScreen.emptyText: The bottom sheet updates with distance, score, and quick actions.
mapScreen.webTitle: Map view is simplified on web beta.
mapScreen.noSpotSelectedText: Choose a spot from the list to see its score and quick actions.

spotDetail.waitingNextRunNative: Waiting for the next forecast run
spotDetail.trendCloudSummary: {{trend}}, {{cloud}}% cloud cover at the best hour.
spotDetail.forecastSettlingNative: Forecast metrics are still settling. Pull to refresh from the main screen if needed.
spotDetail.forecastLoadingWeb: Forecast metrics are still loading for this stop.

dressAdvice.arctic: Arctic setup: thermal base, insulated mid-layer, down jacket, windproof shell, mittens, warm boots.
dressAdvice.veryCold: Very cold: wool base layer, fleece/down mid-layer, insulated jacket, hat, gloves, winter boots.
dressAdvice.cold: Cold: layered top, insulated jacket, gloves, and warm footwear.
dressAdvice.cool: Cool: light layers plus a wind-resistant outer jacket.

spotDetail.cloudForecastTitleNative: Cloud cover over the next hours
spotDetail.timelineCaption: Taller, brighter bars mean clearer sky.
spotDetail.noCloudData: Hourly cloud data is not available for this spot right now.
spotDetail.noPhotosText: Verified photos for this spot are coming soon.
spotDetail.mapPreviewSimplified: Map preview is simplified on web beta.
spotDetail.hourlyClearnessA11y: Hourly sky clearness for this spot

dataQuality.backendUnavailable: Backend snapshot is unavailable. Showing live source data instead.
dataQuality.kpFallback: KP is using a backup estimate because the upstream feed failed.
dataQuality.weatherFallback_one: Weather data is estimated for {{count}} spot because forecast fetches failed.
dataQuality.weatherFallback_other: Weather data is estimated for {{count}} spots because forecast fetches failed.

consent.title: Help improve aurora spots?
consent.body: Share anonymous usage — we count which spots people view and navigate to (never who you are, never your location, just spot names and the hour). You can say no and everything works the same.
consent.footnote: You can change this later from the All Spots tab.
consent.toggleOnHelper: Sharing anonymous spot views and navigation taps.

languagePicker.label: Language / Sprache / Langue / Idioma / 语言
